tests.description: refused destructive call does not poison the caller
failure after destructive work carries destructiveRan
destructive success then later failure carries destructiveRan
try over a returned destructive failure ORs it into the activation
destructive work and failure inside a block: escaping failure stamped at block halt
destructive work in a block, failure after: join folds the flag
destructive call inside an if block is tracked via the subtree walk
destructive call inside a for loop is tracked via the subtree walk
unmarked function failure is neither started nor destructive
